purpose: First real historical GLD Clean Fast Break replay v1 fixture. This fixture copies validated 1H RTH source OHLCV rows and covers signal/stage/lifecycle candidate shape only; it excludes trade outcomes, option economics, account sizing, broker execution, live trade decisions, production readiness, generated reports, chart outcomes, and auto-trading.

source_data.setup_type_status: Clean Fast Break CANDIDATE / NEEDS REVIEW

boundary_notes: Each fixture row includes only validated GLD source candles available at or before that row timestamp.
OHLCV values are copied from the validated source CSV without edits or fabricated market data.

24H/daily, macro, IV, event, headline/news, exact trigger, exact invalidation, final blocker priority, final caution list, accepted signal row, room, extension, and final proof fields remain unconfirmed or TO REVIEW where repo evidence does not prove them.
Expected output rows are signal/stage/lifecycle candidate assertions only, not live trade instructions or execution recommendations.
Continuation and Ideal are not accepted relabels for this Clean Fast Break candidate fixture unless later repo-backed validation proves them.

This fixture does not include P&L, option contract economics, account sizing, trade outcome, broker/order/execution content, production readiness, generated replay reports, chart outcomes, or auto-trading behavior.
